title: 2024 UNESCO International Literacy Prizes
description: Six groundbreaking literacy initiatives were honored for promoting multilingual education and literacy for mutual understanding and peace across developing nations.

title: UNESCO King Sejong Literacy Prize 2024
description: Awarded to 'Libraries Without Walls' initiative for exceptional contributions to mother-tongue literacy education programs.

title: AU Continental Teacher Prize 2025
description: World Teachers' Day celebration recognizing Africa's best educators who advance the Continental Education Strategy for Africa (CESA 16-25) and Agenda 2063.

title: PACTED 2025 Teacher Recognition
description: Pan-African Conference on Teacher Education concluded with launch of multilingual platform and recognition of Africa's top 10 teachers.

title: Global Partnership for Education Annual Recognition 2024
description: GPE's commitment to ensuring quality education for every child, supporting partner countries through economic shocks, climate change, and conflict.

title: Varkey Foundation Global Teacher Prize 2025
description: Annual $1 million award recognizing exceptional teachers who have made significant impact on students and communities worldwide, including African finalists.

title: UNESCO Literacy Prizes 2025 - Digital Era Theme
description: Nominations open for 2025 prizes spotlighting promoting literacy in a digital era, deadline June 13, 2025.

title: Global Schools Prize 2025
description: New $1 million landmark education award recognizing exceptional schools reimagining education for the future.
